parameters.content:
**🎙️ STEP 2 — GROQ SETUP (Audio Transcription)**

Free tier: 28,800 seconds/day — no card needed!

1. Go to console.groq.com → API Keys → Create Key
2. In n8n → Settings → Credentials → New → **Header Auth**
   - Name: `Authorization`
   - Value: `Bearer YOUR_GROQ_KEY_HERE`
3. In the **Transcribe Audio** node → select this credential

Supported formats: .mp3 .mp4 .wav .m4a .webm
Model: whisper-large-v3-turbo (fast + accurate)

**🤖 STEP 3 — OPENROUTER SETUP (AI Summarization)**

1. Go to openrouter.ai → Keys → Create Key
2. In n8n → Settings → Credentials → New → **Header Auth**
   - Name: `Authorization`
   - Value: `Bearer YOUR_OPENROUTER_KEY_HERE`
3. In the **Call AI API** node → select this credential

Free models available!
Recommended: openai/gpt-4o-mini

**📄 STEP 4 — GOOGLE DOCS SETUP**

1. In n8n → Settings → Credentials → New → Google Docs OAuth2
2. Sign in with your Google account and allow access
3. Select this credential in both Google Docs nodes

The summary doc will be created in your Google Drive root folder. You can move or rename it afterwards.

**⚙️ STEP 1 — TRIGGER SETUP**

**📝 Text Input:**
Send POST with JSON body:
```json
{
  "transcript": "Full meeting transcript...",
  "meeting_title": "Weekly Sync",
  "meeting_date": "2025-05-05"
}
```

**🎙️ Audio Input:**
Send POST with multipart/form-data:
- `audio` → your audio file
- `meeting_title` → optional
- `meeting_date` → optional

Workflow auto-detects which type was sent!

## 📋 Meeting Summary → Action Items 

**Who is this for?**
Anyone who wants to turn raw meeting transcripts OR audio recordings into structured, ready-to-use summaries — without manually writing notes.

**What it does:**
Send transcript text OR upload an audio file → AI generates a clean Google Doc with:
- ✅ Executive Summary (2–3 lines)
- ✅ Key Decisions Made
- ✅ Action Items (numbered, with Owner & Deadline)
- ✅ Suggested Next Meeting Agenda

**Supports Two Input Types:**
📝 Text — Paste transcript as JSON
🎙️ Audio — Upload .mp3 / .mp4 / .wav / .m4a (auto-transcribed via Groq Whisper)

**How it works:**
1. Send POST request with text OR audio file
2. Workflow auto-detects input type
3. Audio is transcribed via Groq Whisper (free, 28,800 sec/day)
4. AI structures content into 4 sections
5. Google Doc is created and link returned

**Requirements:**
- Groq API Key → stored as Header Auth credential (free)
- OpenRouter API Key → stored as Header Auth credential
- Google Docs OAuth2 credentials
